note: Discussions data requires GraphQL API — not available via GitHub MCP tools in this execution context. Data from last successful fetch shown below.
recommended_action: Run gh api graphql query in GitHub Actions or local environment
graphql_query: { repository(owner: "CherryHQ", name: "cherry-studio") { discussions(first: 100, orderBy: {field: UPDATED_AT, direction: DESC}) { nodes { number title category { name } author { login } createdAt updatedAt upvoteCount comments { totalCount } answer { author { login } createdAt } } } } }
